name: adrock-extrator-emails
title: Ad Rock Email Extractor – Website Email Scraper
description: Extract valid public email addresses from websites and their internal pages. Just provide one or more URLs and the actor will crawl the site, deduplicate results, group emails, and store them in a dataset ready for CSV export. Ideal for outreach, lead generation, NGOs, associations, and research.

fields.name: email
fields.title: Email address
fields.description: The extracted email address found on the page.

fields.name: url
fields.title: Source URL
fields.description: The URL where the email address was found.

fields.name: group
fields.title: Group
fields.description: The group of the result based on email count (e.g., 0-50, 51-100).
